fields.name: excerpt
fields.label: Excerpt
fields.description: A one-sentence summary shown on post cards and in SEO.

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Topics
fields.description: Add topic labels freely. Examples: Foundations, Process, Conditions, AI.

fields.name: author
fields.label: Author ID
fields.description: Use the author file name, such as ares or sam.

fields.name: companionSlug
fields.label: Companion Post Slug
fields.description: Optional. Use the slug of a companion post.

fields.name: linkedInUrl

fields.description: Paste the URL for the LinkedIn version of this post.

fields.name: bio
fields.label: Short Bio
fields.description: Used on homepage, about cards, and bylines.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Full Bio
fields.description: Used on the individual founder page.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
